summary: Set 067 Session 4 of 4 (FINAL): conditional producer wiring + synthesis + release. Experiment A (S3) CONFIRMED path-aware capability, so the pre-registered S4 gate fired: wired the first-party pull verifier (pull_verifier.py, S1-S2) as an OPT-IN automated producer of the Set 066 path-aware-critique.json artifact. New ai_router/pull_critique.py: produce_path_aware_critique() drives pull_route once per provider (default GPT-5.4 + Gemini-Pro) over a read-only repo sandbox, reuses the manual path-aware-critique.md template as the critique instruction, assembles the Set 066 envelope, and writes it beside spec.md. It REFUSES to write a gate-failing artifact (>=2 distinct providers with usable verdicts; a failing provider is skipped not fatal), stamps sessionSetName + the recorded pathAwareCritique level, and (S4 R1 fix) a write-mode gate-identity guard makes the stamped level match the recorded policy so it can never write a written-but-gate-rejected artifact (an explicit level override is dry-run-only). Validated with the same validator the gate uses before writing. CLI: python -m ai_router.pull_critique <set-dir> [--provider p:m] [--sandbox] [--level] [--dry-run]; CLI status is ASCII-sanitized (S4 R1 fix). Manual flow stays the default; producer is strictly opt-in. Exported the public surface from __init__. 12 new tests (fake run_pull, no metered calls); full Python suite green. Docs: new ai_router/docs/pull-verifier.md + automated-alternative notes in the schema doc and template. Version ai_router 0.20.0 -> 0.21.0 + CHANGELOG. Routed per-session verification UNCHANGED; run_test sandbox / contract-gate / Experiment B / routed keep-demote-retire all deferred to Set 068. VERIFICATION: gpt-5.4 R1 ISSUES_FOUND (2 findings: level-override could write a gate-rejected artifact; CLI unsanitized output) -> both fixed -> R2 VERIFIED. DOGFOOD (pathAwareCritique:required): produced this set's own path-aware-critique.json via the NEW producer (recursive dogfood) over a focused sandbox; GOTCHA - GPT-5.4 over-probes and exhausts the token budget without converging to a verdict on non-trivial-file sandboxes (28 probes, stop=token-budget), so the dogfood used the converging Gemini-Pro + Anthropic-Sonnet pair (>=2 distinct providers; per-session verification was already cross-provider via GPT). Also authored adversarial-critique-prompt.md (operator-requested whole-set critique prompt for GPT/Gemini).

reason.specifics: Routed rec (analysis) for Set 068 S1 (the next session): the run_test disposable-worktree sandbox is security-sensitive, production-grade systems work (git-worktree write-caging, sandboxed test execution, lifecycle/error handling) where a top-tier code-generation model on high effort fits; recorded for the next set, not binding.
